title: lotononis calycina var. hirsutissima
intro: Lotononis calycina var. hirsutissima is a plant species, also known as the hairy lotononis, which belongs to the Fabaceae family of flowering plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential in reducing fever and inflammation, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. Studies suggest that the plant has antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
